Catalog/Infection Prevention/Mevel Knee O Drape
Infection PreventionREF: MKD2330M1

Mevel Knee O Drape

MEVEL · Surgical Drapes

Knee O drape for knee procedures

MaterialNon-Woven Fabric (Medical Grade)
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Mevel Knee O Drape is a sterile surgical drape specifically designed for knee procedures, featuring non-woven fabric construction for optimal infection prevention. The O-shaped design provides precise surgical site access while maintaining complete sterile barrier protection during orthopedic knee surgeries. This high-quality drape ensures maximum patient safety and procedural efficiency for hospitals and surgical centers. Ideal for knee arthroscopy, total knee replacement, and other knee surgical interventions.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Mevel Knee O Drape, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Mevel Knee O Drape is constructed using Non-Woven Fabric (Medical Grade), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
